name.description: The name of the function. Required for function type tools.

description.description: A description of what the function does.

parameters.description:
The parameters the function accepts, described as a JSON
Schema object. Required for function type tools.

strict.description: Whether strict schema adherence is enabled for function tools.

vector_store_ids.description:
The IDs of the vector stores to search. Required for
file_search type tools.

max_num_results.description: The maximum number of results to return from file search.

ranking_options.description: Ranking options for file search results.

container.description:
The container for the code interpreter tool. Specifies
the sandbox environment.

display_width.description:
The width of the computer display in pixels. Required
for computer_use_preview type.

display_height.description:
The height of the computer display in pixels. Required
for computer_use_preview type.

environment.description:
The environment of the computer. Required for
computer_use_preview type.

server_label.description: A label for the MCP server. Required for mcp type tools.

server_url.description: The URL of the MCP server. Required for mcp type tools.

allowed_tools.description: The list of allowed tool names from the MCP server.

headers.description: Headers to pass to the MCP server for authentication.
